sentence: O ceo non esta claro nesta manh茫.
ipa: 藞蓴 藞s毯蓻o 藞n蓴虄 藞蓻s毯t蓯 藞kla删o 藞n蓻s毯t蓯 藞ma刹茫
gloss_en: The sky is not clear this morning.
notes: Deaffricated <c> before front vowel [藞s毯蓻o] (Galaico-Portuguese /t汀s/ has collapsed to apico-alveolar [s毯]) and archaic negator <non> per maia1986; open-mid tonic [蓻 蓴] per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: A minha senhora mora perto do rio caudaloso.
ipa: 藞蓯 藞mi刹蓯 se藞刹蓴删蓯 藞m蓴删蓯 藞p蓻删to 藞d蓴 藞删io kawda藞l蓴z毯o
gloss_en: My lady lives near the mighty river.
notes: Palatal <nh> [刹] and final-vowel reduction to [蓯] (an Old-Portuguese innovation over Galaico-Portuguese) per maia1986; open/close-mid contrast per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Vai agora pela carreira do vale.
ipa: 藞vaj 蓯藞伞蓴删蓯 藞p蓻l蓯 ka藞rej删蓯 藞d蓴 藞vale
gloss_en: Go now along the road of the valley.
notes: Trilled <rr> [r] in <carreira> and coda /l/ in <vale> per maia1986; <Vai agora> vowel liaison per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: O pescado do mar era saboroso e fresco.
ipa: 藞蓴 pe藞s毯kado 藞d蓴 藞ma删 藞蓻删蓯 sabo藞删蓴z毯o 藞蓻 藞f删蓻s毯ko
gloss_en: The fish from the sea was tasty and fresh.
notes: Apico-alveolar [s毯] for <s> in coda and onset (no chiado yet) per maia1986; <saboroso e> liaison and open-mid [蓻 蓴] per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Onde mora vossa madre nesta vila?
ipa: 藞蓴虄de 藞m蓴删蓯 藞v蓴s毯蓯 藞mad删e 藞n蓻s毯t蓯 藞vil蓯
gloss_en: Where does your mother live in this town?
notes: Archaic lexicon <madre> ('mother') and possessive <vossa> per cunha_cintra1984; final unstressed [蓯] reduction per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Quantos dias durou a vossa viagem?
ipa: 藞kwa虄tos毯 藞dias毯 du藞删ow 藞蓯 藞v蓴s毯蓯 vi藞a蕭e虄
gloss_en: How many days did your journey last?
notes: Retained <ou> diphthong [du藞删ow] per maia1986; <durou a> liaison and reduced final [蓯] per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Se eu podesse, iria veer a rainha.
ipa: 藞s蓻 藞ew po藞d蓻s毯e i藞删i蓯 ve藞蓻删 藞蓯 藞删aj刹蓯
gloss_en: If I could, I would go to see the queen.
notes: Archaic hiatus infinitive <veer> [ve藞蓻删] and imperfect-subjunctive <podesse> per cunha_cintra1984; palatal <nh> in <rainha> per maia1986.

sentence: Comprei p茫o e vinho na feira grande.
ipa: ko虄藞p删ej 藞p蓯虄w虄 藞蓻 藞vi刹o 藞n蓯 藞fej删蓯 藞伞删a虄de
gloss_en: I bought bread and wine at the great fair.
notes: Nasal diphthong <茫o> [藞p蓯虄w虄] (fully phonemicised in Old Portuguese) per mateus_dandrade2000; retained <ei> and palatal <nh> per maia1986.

sentence: Amanh茫 irei pelo caminho da montanha.
ipa: 蓯藞ma刹茫 i藞删ej 藞p蓻lo ka藞mi刹o 藞d蓯 mo虄藞ta刹蓯
gloss_en: Tomorrow I will go along the mountain path.
notes: Palatals <nh> [刹] and retained <ei> [i藞删ej] per maia1986; <Amanh茫 irei> liaison per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Chamade o mo莽o que traga o cavalo.
ipa: t汀蕛a藞made 藞蓴 藞m蓴s毯o 藞ke 藞t删a伞蓯 藞蓴 ka藞valo
gloss_en: Call the boy to bring the horse.
notes: Second-plural imperative <chamade> per cunha_cintra1984; deaffricated <莽> [藞m蓴s毯o] (former /t汀s/) per maia1986.

sentence: Boa manh茫, senhora; como vos vai a saude?
ipa: 藞b蓴蓯 藞ma刹茫 se藞刹蓴删蓯 藞k蓴mo 藞v蓴s毯 藞vaj 藞蓯 藞sawde
gloss_en: Good morning, lady; how does your health fare?
notes: Clitic address <vos> per cunha_cintra1984; palatal <nh>, open-mid [蓴] and <vai a> liaison per maia1986.

sentence: Mais val b玫o amigo que muito parente.
ipa: 藞majs毯 藞val 藞b玫o 蓯藞mi伞o 藞ke 藞mujto pa藞删蓻虄te
gloss_en: A good friend is worth more than many kinsmen.
notes: Archaic nasal-hiatus <b玫o> [藞b玫o] and apocopated <val> per cunha_cintra1984; coda /l/ per maia1986.

sentence: O gato negro dorme sob o banco velho.
ipa: 藞蓴 藞伞ato 藞n蓻伞删o 藞d蓴删me 藞s蓴b 藞蓴 藞ba虄ko 藞v蓻蕩o
gloss_en: The black cat sleeps under the old bench.
notes: Open-mid [蓴 蓻] and palatal <lh> [藞v蓻蕩o] per maia1986; <sob o> junction per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Aquele rato fugiu para o buraco.
ipa: 蓯藞k蓻le 藞删ato fu藞蕭iu 藞pa删蓯 藞蓴 bu藞删ako
gloss_en: That mouse fled into the hole.
notes: Final-vowel reduction to [蓯] in <para> and <fugiu o> junction per mateus_dandrade2000; unreduced tonic per maia1986.

sentence: O mundo enteiro fala deste grande feito.
ipa: 藞蓴 藞mu虄do e虄藞tej删o 藞fal蓯 藞d蓻s毯te 藞伞删a虄de 藞fejto
gloss_en: The whole world speaks of this great deed.
notes: Archaic <enteiro>/<feito> with retained <ei> per maia1986; final [蓯] reduction and open-mid [蓻] per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: O sol luz sobre as colinas verdes.
ipa: 藞蓴 藞s蓴l 藞luz 藞s蓴b删e 藞蓯s毯 ko藞linas毯 藞v蓻删des毯
gloss_en: The sun shines over the green hills.
notes: Coda /l/ [藞s蓴l] and apico-alveolar coda [s毯] (no chiado) per maia1986; <sobre as> liaison per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: A serra e alta e o rio corre forte.
ipa: 藞蓯 藞s蓻r蓯 藞蓻 藞蓯lt蓯 藞蓻 藞蓴 藞删io 藞k蓴re 藞f蓴删te
gloss_en: The mountain range is high and the river runs strong.
notes: Trilled <rr> [r] in <serra>/<corre> per maia1986; <serra e>/<e alta> liaison and open-mid [蓻 蓴] per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Minha filha colheu as flores no vale.
ipa: 藞mi刹蓯 藞fi蕩蓯 ko藞蕩ew 藞蓯s毯 藞fl蓴删es毯 藞n蓴 藞vale
gloss_en: My daughter gathered the flowers in the valley.
notes: Palatals <nh>/<lh> [刹 蕩] and archaic hiatus <colheu> per maia1986; final [蓯] reduction per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: A cidade tem muitas ruas e pontes.
ipa: 藞蓯 s毯i藞dade 藞t蓻虄 藞mujtas毯 藞删uas毯 藞蓻 藞p蓴虄tes毯
gloss_en: The city has many streets and bridges.
notes: Deaffricated <c> before front vowel [s毯i藞dade] (former /t汀s/) per maia1986; <ruas e> liaison per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: O cora莽茫o da donzela era leal e nobre.
ipa: 藞蓴 ko藞删as毯蓯虄w虄 藞d蓯 do虄藞z蓻l蓯 藞蓻删蓯 le藞al 藞蓻 藞n蓴b删e
gloss_en: The maiden's heart was loyal and noble.
notes: Deaffricated <莽> before nasal diphthong [ko藞删as毯蓯虄w虄] (Old-Portuguese /t汀s/>[s毯]) per maia1986; nasal diphthong <茫o> and coda /l/ in <leal> per mateus_dandrade2000.
